---
title: "Marcus Lewis"
about:
  template: trestles  # jolla  trestles  solana  marquee  broadside
  image: img/marcuslinkedin.png
  image-width: 16em
  image-shape: rounded # rectangle  round  rounded
  
  links:
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/marcus-lewis-607b98260/
    - icon: instagram
      text: Instagram
      href: https://www.instagram.com/marcusjabari_/?hl=en
    - icon: github
      text: GitHub
      href: https://github.com/marcusjabari/
    - icon: file-earmark-pdf
      text: Resumé
      href: resume-example.pdf
      target: _blank
    - icon: mailbox
      text: Email
      href: mailto:mjl31@geneseo.edu

---


Hello, I'm Marcus! I major in Data Analytics at SUNY Geneseo. Outside of Data Analytics, I enjoy participating in MMA and I am currently learning how to fish!.

## Education

State University of New York at Geneseo | Geneseo, NY <br>
B.S. in Data Analytics | Aug 2022 - May 2026 <br>


## Experience

- Laboratory for Laser Energetics - University of Rochester | Project Assistant| May 2024 - Aug 2024
- SUNY Geneseo - Sports Data and Social Media Intern | September 2023- 2026
- WebSeal - Rochester, NY | Production Associate |
